_comment: Target companies for jobs.py. Each entry needs: name, ats (greenhouse|lever|ashby|workable), slug (the board identifier in the ATS URL), and optionally tier (1-3, for prioritizing) and domain (a free-text label). The slug is the last path segment of the board URL, e.g. job-boards.greenhouse.io/<slug>. The examples below are real public boards so you can run it immediately; replace with your own targets.

manual_watch.name: Example Co
manual_watch.note: Uses Workday or a custom board — not supported by jobs.py adapters; check by hand.

filters._comment: A job is kept if its location matches any location_keyword (or has no location), its title matches any role_keyword, and its title matches no exclude_keyword. Substring, case-insensitive.
